title: On Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
text: On Holding AG announced strong full-year 2025 results with net sales increasing by 30.0% year-over-year to CHF 3,014.0 million (approximately $3.7 billion). The company achieved gross profit margin expansion to 62.8% and adjusted EBITDA margin to 18.8%. For 2026, On expects net sales to grow by at least 23% on a constant currency basis, with current spot rates implying reported net sales of at least CHF 3.44 billion. In Q2 2025, On raised its full-year revenue guidance to CHF 2.91 billion ($3.58 billion). Following Q3 2025 results, the company raised its full-year 2025 guidance, expecting constant currency net sales growth of 34% year-over-year.
